rules: [P1] Enforce strict multi-parameter equality constraints (e.g., Name, DOB) for patient identification via tool validation.
[P1] Verify temporal validity of clinical data against requested windows/current timestamps before evaluating conditional triggers.
[P1] Exhaust search strategy by iterating from specific codes to broad categories before declaring data missing.
[P1] Mandate tool invocation for all requests involving entity attributes or clinical data.
[P1] Execute diagnostic retrieval steps before initiating therapeutic or order-based actions.
[P1] Map all provided entity attributes into a single search query to minimize retrieval steps.
[P1] Terminate workflow immediately with a summary statement when a prerequisite condition or mandatory data is missing.
[P1] Distinguish between 'missing', 'unknown', and 'missing from prompt' data states via cross-referencing.
[P1] Calculate future/absolute dates against a base reference time using explicit arithmetic.
[P1] Do not represent pending actions as completed.
[P1] Draft a sequential plan for multi-step clinical workflows immediately after initial data retrieval.
[P1] Execute all conditional clinical actions via tool calls rather than descriptive text.
[P1] Map structured narrative components (e.g., SBAR) directly into designated fields without alteration.
[P1] Never assume data absence without executing a targeted search tool call; avoid substituting tool-based verification with internal state assumptions.
[P1] Return explicit null indicators (e.g., 'Patient not found') when diagnostic queries yield zero results.
[P1] Treat provided clinical summaries as immutable strings.
[P1] Validate that mandatory clinical notes include all required structured components before submission.
[P1] Verify reference ranges against provided clinical guidelines rather than assuming general ranges.
[P1] Verify tool execution success by confirming parameter alignment with prompt-provided clinical details.
[P1] Explicitly state reasons for withholding actions when prerequisites are unmet.
[P1] Chain related clinical orders in a single workflow block once initial data confirms the condition.
[P1] Ensure final response justification aligns strictly with the conditional logic branch taken.
[P1] Prioritize filtering retrieval results for the most recent entry before logic application.
[P1] Associate all clinical data entries with ISO-8601 timestamps.
